results.rendered_html: brahma—purāṇa n. N. of one of the 18 Purāṇas (also called ādi-p˚; it is supposed to have been revealed by Brahmā to Dakṣa, and its main object appears to be the promotion of the worship of Kṛṣṇa),  IW. 514.
